page_content:
Formerly: SPHL401.

PHSC402 Public Health Emergency Preparedness (3 Credits)

Intensive introduction to public health emergency preparedness. Course will provide students with an overview of the role of public health

in planning, prevention, preparedness, response, and recovery from disasters, both manmade and natural.

Restriction: Must be in Public Health Science program; and must have earned a minimum of 60 credits.

Credit Only Granted for. PHSC402 or SPHL402.
